title: chlorocyperus nilagiricus
intro: Chlorocyperus nilagiricus, also known as the Nilgiri sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in the Western Ghats region of India. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chlorocyperus nilagiricus include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, including decoctions and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
